info.name: Jalan Spesifikasi Desain Module
info.description: API collection for Jalan Spesifikasi Desain (Road Design Specification) module - Management of road design specifications with volume, dimensions, and HSPK references

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Jalan Spesifikasi Desain (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all jalan spesifikasi desain with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain list retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "data": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "id_usulan_jalan": 1,
        "id_ruang_lingkup": 1,
        "id_hspk": 1,
        "volume": 100.5,
        "lebar": 6.0,
        "spasi": 0.5,
        "tinggi": 0.3,
        "createdAt": "...",
        "updatedAt": "..."
      }
    ],
    "page": 1,
    "amount": 10,
    "total": 5,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

item.name: Get Jalan Spesifikasi Desain by ID

request.description:
Get single jalan spesifikasi desain by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_usulan_jalan": 1,
    "id_ruang_lingkup": 1,
    "id_hspk": 1,
    "volume": 100.5,
    "lebar": 6.0,
    "spasi": 0.5,
    "tinggi": 0.3,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

item.description: Read endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN, OPD)

request.description:
Create new jalan spesifikasi desain entry.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN, OPD

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id_usulan_jalan": number,    // Required - Road proposal ID
  "id_ruang_lingkup": number,    // Required - Road scope ID
  "id_hspk": number,            // Required - HSPK (Harga Satuan Pokok Kegiatan) ID
  "volume": number,              // Required - Volume (m³)
  "lebar": number,               // Required - Width (m)
  "spasi": number,                // Required - Spacing (m)
  "tinggi": number                // Required - Height (m)
}
```

**Field Descriptions**:
- **id_usulan_jalan**: Reference to road proposal
- **id_ruang_lingkup**: Reference to road scope
- **id_hspk**: Reference to standard unit price (HSPK)
- **volume**: Total volume in cubic meters
- **lebar**: Width dimension in meters
- **spasi**: Spacing between elements in meters
- **tinggi**: Height dimension in meters

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_usulan_jalan": 1,
    "id_ruang_lingkup": 1,
    "id_hspk": 1,
    "volume": 100.5,
    "lebar": 6.0,
    "spasi": 0.5,
    "tinggi": 0.3,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Update existing jalan spesifikasi desain.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN, OPD

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,                 // Required - ID to update
  "id_usulan_jalan": number,    // Optional - Road proposal ID
  "id_ruang_lingkup": number,   // Optional - Road scope ID
  "id_hspk": number,            // Optional - HSPK ID
  "volume": number,             // Optional - Volume (m³)
  "lebar": number,               // Optional - Width (m)
  "spasi": number,               // Optional - Spacing (m)
  "tinggi": number               // Optional - Height (m)
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "id_usulan_jalan": 1,
    "id_ruang_lingkup": 1,
    "id_hspk": 1,
    "volume": 105.0,
    "lebar": 6.5,
    "spasi": 0.5,
    "tinggi": 0.3,
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Delete jalan spesifikasi desain by ID.

**Roles**: ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Jalan Spesifikasi Desain deleted successfully",
  "data": true
}
```

item.description: Create, Update operations accessible by ADMIN, SUPERADMIN, OPD. Delete only by ADMIN, SUPERADMIN
